agents.name: Ticket Assignment Agent
agents.description: Analyzes new Azure DevOps tickets, matches ticket tags to developer skill profiles, evaluates developer workload (active ticket count vs. capacity), assigns the optimal developer, and sets a deadline based on ticket priority/complexity.

agents.name: Daily Check-In Agent
agents.description: Collects free-text progress summaries from developers, extracts ticket status updates, identifies blockers or at-risk items, and updates the progress tracking board with parsed insights.

schedules.message: Send daily check-in prompts to all developers and process any submitted progress summaries.
